items.title: Dow Closes at Record; S&P 500, Nasdaq Rebound After Tech Sell-Off; Comcast Stock Surges on Plan to Split
items.content: Major US indexes finished higher Monday, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average closing at a record. S&P 500 rose 1.2%, Nasdaq 100 surged 2.3%, snapping five-session tech sell-off.

items.title: US stocks closed sharply higher with S&P 500 rising 1.2%
items.content: S&P 500 rising 1.2%, the Nasdaq 100 surging 2.3%, and the Dow Jones gaining 307 points to finish at a fresh record high, as investors reassessed the AI trade.

items.title: S&P 500, Nasdaq Post Weekly Losses as Tech Sell-Off Continues
items.content: S&P 500 and Nasdaq posted weekly losses for the week ending June 26 as tech sell-off extended, though Dow held relatively stable.

items.title: Hang Seng Index Soars to 23,026 as Hong Kong Stocks Rebound on Peace Talk Optimism and Technology Recovery
items.content: Hang Seng Index advanced 1.57% to close at 23,026.68 on Monday June 29, posting strong recovery after prior session's sharp global technology selloff.

items.title: Hang Seng Falls 1.8% to 22,672 as AI Chip Rout and IPO Market Uncertainty Overshadow Quarter-End
items.content: Hang Seng Index closed Friday June 26 at 22,672 points, a 1.8% decline of approximately 405 points, driven by AI chip rout.

items.title: PCE inflation report May 2026: Core inflation rate hit 3.4%, highest since October 2023
items.content: Fed's preferred PCE gauge showed core annual rate at 3.4% (highest since Oct 2023), headline PCE at 4.1% annual rate (highest since April 2023). Driven largely by Iran war-related energy price acceleration.

items.title: May US PCE inflation tops 4%, leaves Fed hike on the table
items.content: May PCE inflation reading at 4.1% annual rate, consumer spending remained strong, leaving possibility of further Fed rate hikes.

items.title: 2026 Strait of Hormuz crisis: US Navy announced widened route through Strait of Hormuz on June 27
items.content: On June 27, the Joint Maritime Information Center (JMIC) overseen by the US Navy announced a widened route through the Strait of Hormuz. Iran had re-closed the strait on June 20 after ceasefire violations.

items.title: Micron (MU) earnings Q3 2026: Revenue quadruples, stock jumps 15%
items.content: Micron reported Q3 revenue of $41.46B vs $35.84B estimated, EPS $25.11 vs $20.78. Revenue quadrupled from $9.3B a year earlier. Q4 guidance $50B revenue, well above $43.58B consensus.

items.title: SSE Composite Index Holds Near 4,120 as AI Stocks Rally and Micron Earnings Lift China Tech
items.content: China's Shanghai Composite Index closed at about 4,120 points (+0.23%) on June 25, supported by AI stock rally and positive spillover from Micron earnings.

items.title: Global tech sell-off deepens: Nvidia, Alphabet sit out bounce; SMIC tumbles nearly 7%
items.content: Tech sell-off extended across Greater China. Tencent, Alibaba, Baidu, Xiaomi all fell. SMIC tumbled nearly 7% as chip stocks were among the hardest hit globally.

items.title: China's technology IPO market rebounds on AI and semiconductor push
items.content: Technology companies raised a combined $3.1 billion through stock listings in China between Jan and mid-June 2026, driven by AI and semiconductor IPO momentum.
